title: DVD-rental store revises membership application process
summary: In order to become a member of a DVD-rental store, an individual was obliged to present identification, including his driver’s licence. He provided the store with his credit card information and showed his driver’s licence. However, he refused to allow the store to enter the details of his licence into its database, as he believed this to...
dedupKey: dvd rental store revises membership application process|2006-12-14
